SEARCH
Package com.dropbox.core.v2.sharing

Class RemoveMemberJobStatus

java.lang.Object
com.dropbox.core.v2.sharing.RemoveMemberJobStatus
public final class RemoveMemberJobStatus extends Object
This class is a tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isAbc() methods will return true. You can use tag() to determine the tag associated with this instance.

  • Field Details

    • IN_PROGRESS

      public static final RemoveMemberJobStatus IN_PROGRESS
      The asynchronous job is still in progress.

  • Method Details

    • tag

      public RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag tag()
      Returns the tag for this instance.

      This class is a tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isXyz() methods will return true. Callers are recommended to use the tag value in a switch statement to properly handle the different values for this RemoveMemberJobStatus.

      Returns:
      the tag for this instance.

    • isInProgress

      public boolean isInProgress()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.IN_PROGRESS, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.IN_PROGRESS, false otherwise.

    • isComplete

      public boolean isComplete()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.COMPLETE, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.COMPLETE, false otherwise.

    • complete

      public static RemoveMemberJobStatus complete(MemberAccessLevelResult value)
      Returns an instance of RemoveMemberJobStatus that has its tag set to RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.COMPLETE.

      Removing the folder member has finished. The value is information about whether the member has another form of access.

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of RemoveMemberJobStatus with its tag set to RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.COMPLETE.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getCompleteValue

      public MemberAccessLevelResult getCompleteValue()
      Removing the folder member has finished. The value is information about whether the member has another form of access.

      This instance must be tagged as RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.COMPLETE.

      Returns:
      The MemberAccessLevelResult value associated with this instance if isComplete() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isComplete() is false.

    • isFailed

      public boolean isFailed()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.FAILED, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.FAILED, false otherwise.

    • failed

      public static RemoveMemberJobStatus failed(RemoveFolderMemberError value)
      Returns an instance of RemoveMemberJobStatus that has its tag set to RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.FAILED.

      None

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of RemoveMemberJobStatus with its tag set to RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.FAILED.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getFailedValue

      public RemoveFolderMemberError getFailedValue()
      This instance must be tagged as RemoveMemberJobStatus.Tag.FAILED.
      Returns:
      The RemoveFolderMemberError value associated with this instance if isFailed() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isFailed() is false.
